headline: Assessing Waters (WAT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And BD Combination Plans
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Waters (WAT) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down around 16% over the past month and about 20% over the past 3 months, prompting closer attention from investors. The company provides analytical workflow solutions through its Waters and TA segments, serving pharmaceutical, industrial, academic, and government customers across Asia, the Americas, and Europe. See our latest analysis for Waters. At a share price of $319.04, Waters...
